name: Media Generator
description: Native media generation workspace for image, video, and audio tasks through Gee's global Xenodia channel.

capabilities.title: List media generation models
capabilities.description: List the media generation models exposed through Gee's global Xenodia channel.
examples: What image generation models can I use?

codex.skill_hint: Use when Codex needs to inspect the media generation models available through GeeAgent.

capabilities.title: Create media generation task
capabilities.description: Create an image or video generation task from a prompt, model, optional parameters, and optional reference paths or URLs.
examples: Generate an image of a neon rainy study room
Use this reference image and make a cinematic poster
Generate a five second Veo3.1 video teaser
Create a Seedance 2.0 product video from these reference URLs

category.description: Use image for Nano Banana Pro or GPT Image-2. Use video for Xenodia Veo3.1 or Seedance 2.0.

model.description: Use gpt-image-2 for GPT Image-2. image-2 is accepted as an alias. Video models use Xenodia Veo3.1 or Seedance 2.0 IDs.

n.description: Image-only provider count. Xenodia image generation currently supports only 1 image per request.

batch_count.description: Gear-level fan-out for image and video. Gee creates one Xenodia task per requested result and returns one grouped batch result.

response_format.description: Only URL responses are currently supported.

aspect_ratio.description: Supported values vary by selected image or video model. Veo accepts 16:9, 9:16, or auto. Seedance accepts adaptive, 1:1, 4:3, 3:4, 16:9, 9:16, or 21:9.

resolution.description: Supported values vary by model. Image models use K resolutions; video models use 480p, 720p, 1080p, or Veo 4k where supported.

generation_type.description: Veo mode. REFERENCE_2_VIDEO requires veo3.1_fast. Seedance uses this as Gee UI intent for text, first/last frame, or reference modes.

first_frame_url.description: Seedance first frame image URL or asset:// ID. Also accepted by Gee as a frame URL for Veo FIRST_AND_LAST_FRAMES_2_VIDEO.

last_frame_url.description: Seedance last frame image URL or asset:// ID. Requires first_frame_url.

reference_urls.description: Remote reference image URLs. Image models pass them as Xenodia image_input. Veo passes them as imageUrls. Seedance passes them as reference_image_urls unless first/last frame URLs are used.

reference_image_urls.description: Seedance multimodal reference image URLs or asset:// IDs. Gear validation enforces model limits.

reference_video_urls.description: Seedance multimodal reference video URLs or asset:// IDs.

reference_audio_urls.description: Seedance multimodal reference audio URLs or asset:// IDs.

reference_paths.description: Local JPEG, PNG, or WebP reference image paths, up to 30MB each. Image tasks send them as multipart references; video tasks upload them through the configured Xenodia storage upload URL before generation.

codex.skill_hint: Use only when the current user message explicitly asks Codex to create a media generation task. Preserve the user's prompt, map image-2 to gpt-image-2, use batch_count 1-4 for multi-result image or video requests, and report the returned task_id or batch_id/artifact references instead of claiming the media is finished before Gee returns it.

capabilities.title: Get generation task
capabilities.description: Return the latest saved status, prompt, parameters, artifacts, and provider task id for a media generation task.
examples: Check the last image generation task

codex.skill_hint: Use when Codex needs to inspect the saved status or artifacts for a media generation task created in GeeAgent.
